loan_contract_no.default: select max(loan_contract_no) from sc_lon_m_contract where loan_type = 'ส' and begining_of_contract >= sysdate - 3
loan_contract_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

begining_of_contract.text: วันที่ขอกู้

root.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, extract ( day from ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) ) as begin_day, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'MONTH') as begin_month, extract ( year from ( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) ) + 543 as begin_year, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description as coll_name, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_position_long( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) as position_long , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) as mem_group_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name( pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) ) as mem_group_name, pka_com_function.fp_get_district_name( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.province_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.district_code ) as group_distinct , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_tel(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ,0 ) as tel_coll , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) as mem_name , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_spname (sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) as spouse_name, si_security_user.user_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name as manager_coop , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.manager_name as manager_group , PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext_m_live(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) as age_coll from sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_contract_coll, si_security_user, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.appove_officer and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_addr.member_group_no = pka_com_function.fp_get_member_group( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) /*WHERE*/ --AND ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'บ65000003' ) ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ASC
